title: Add Taxonomy Values Directly from the Not Related Tab
story: As a DataTools Pro user just starting out, I want an 'Add +' button on the Not Related taxonomy tab to create new Line of Business and Topic values without leaving the sidebar, so that I can set up categories as I categorize my first metrics.
description:
Adds an 'Add +' button to the Not Related section in the sidebar's taxonomy tabs. When the taxonomy list is empty (new user scenario) or even when it has values, the button opens a popup to create new taxonomy values directly from the sidebar. This eliminates the need to navigate to the settings/topic editor page.

The button is always visible (not just when the list is empty) so users can add new values at any time during metric categorization.
acceptance_criteria: An 'Add +' button appears on the Not Related section for Line of Business and Topic
Clicking the button opens a popup to create a new taxonomy value
Newly created values appear in the Not Related list immediately
The button is visible even when taxonomy values already exist
New users with empty taxonomies see the button as their entry point
ux_changes: 'Add +' button on the Not Related taxonomy section. Popup form for creating new taxonomy values inline. Always visible regardless of list state.
middleware_changes: Taxonomy value creation service callable from the sidebar context.
api_changes: Endpoint for creating a new taxonomy value from the sidebar, returning the updated list.
implementation_notes: Developer extended the functionality beyond the original request (empty-state button) to make it always available, improving the workflow for all users.
comment_summary: Developer proactively added the button for all states (not just empty). Label changed to 'Add +' per feedback. Quick implementation.
